name: Stuffed Tomatoes and Bell Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dry rice Cooked and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the meat by cooking it thoroughly.
2. Cook the rice and let it cool completely.
3. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
4. Add soy sauce to the pan and stir until combined.
5. Sprinkle taco seasoning, five spice powder, nutmeg, and crushed red peppers into the pan. Stir well.
6. Mix in the cooked and cooled rice with the seasonings.
7. Sauté the mixture for a few minutes until heated through.
8. Add spaghetti sauce to the mixture and stir until combined.
9. Grate some ginger using a grater and mix it into the filling.
10. Carefully slice tomatoes or bell peppers in half lengthwise and scoop out the pulp, reserving it for later use.
11. Stuff each tomato or pepper with the prepared filling.
12. Place the stuffed tomatoes or peppers on a baking sheet.
13. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) until tender and slightly charred on the edges, about 20-25 minutes.
14. Turn off the heat and let the stuffed tomatoes or peppers cool for a few minutes before serving.
